summary: Fixed post-reconnect Bridge resync: (A) BridgeDashboard registers a getWebSocketClient().onConnect handler that re-runs loadEscalations/loadProjectTodos/loadCoordinator/loadAudit for the current scope; (B) App.tsx escalation_created handler now also reloads the escalation store, not just a toast; (C) Header renders a Live/Reconnecting/Offline WS badge next to the VSCode badge. Added BridgeDashboard.reconnect.test.tsx (passes). tsc clean for change-set; pre-existing Header.test/displayName failures are stale (project-selector) and identical with/without my change -> foreign, ignored.
